hero.subtitle: Your AI-powered League of Legends coach.
hero.description: Adaptive tactical tips delivered straight to your ear in real time. Fix your macro game, track enemy summoner spells and boost your winrate with automated high-elo pattern analysis.

features.sectionDescription: Our artificial intelligence analyzes every click, decision and map positioning, delivering surgical insights to help you climb to the top of the competitive ladder.
features.autoAnalysisDesc: As soon as you enter the lobby or loading screen, the AI begins decoding the match and delivers crucial lane data.
features.smartRecsDesc: Situational item recommendations, adaptive skill orders and direct counters for the enemy team composition.
features.macroDesc: Learn to rotate like a pro. Audio callouts indicate objective priorities, wave control and optimal recall timings.
features.visionDesc: Your personal radar. Voice alerts warn you if the enemy jungler passed through a ward or when your minimap awareness drops.
features.coachingDesc: The AI adapts to your playstyle. Whether you play passive or aggressive, the tips adjust to complement your gameplay.
features.detectorDesc: Identify recurring mistakes in post-game, such as pointless deaths, overextending without vision or poor farming during lane transitions.
features.benchmarksDesc: Compare your exact reaction time, spell accuracy and trade rate against Grandmaster and Challenger players.
features.performanceDesc: Track your skill scores over time. Watch your mechanics, vision and macro improvement in dynamic reports.

dashboard.sectionTitle: An intelligent command center for your matches
dashboard.sectionDescription: See how Rift Sync AI projects data and insights in real time on your screen, without visual clutter or latency.
dashboard.playerRank: Grandmaster I — 420 LP / Main Role: Mid Lane
dashboard.aiCallout: Rift Sync AI — Audio Callout Active
dashboard.aiMessage: "The enemy jungler (Lee Sin) was spotted in the north river 8 seconds ago. His Flash is down. Pull your wave back within the next 15 seconds or set up a counter-gank with your jungler at mid."
dashboard.heatmapDesc: Circles indicate AI-suggested optimal ward placements based on enemy team composition.

howItWorks.sectionDescription: Four simple steps stand between you and high-elo tips delivered directly to your headset during matches.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Log in 100% securely using the official Riot Sign-On protocol. Zero risk of leaks or penalties.
howItWorks.step2Desc: The engine reads real-time map data from the game client (LCU) and processes complex telemetry instantly.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Hear tactical tips at the right moment. No on-screen popups, just high-definition neural audio that won't interfere with your game sounds.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Fix your positioning habits, learn the best macro strategies and climb divisions within weeks.

differential.sectionTitle: Why is Rift Sync AI different from other LoL sites?
differential.deepAnalysisDesc: Unlike static stat sites that only tell you whether your KDA was good or bad, Rift Sync AI understands the full context. It analyzes whether your death occurred before Baron, whether you were pushing the correct lane (splitpush) or if your build was appropriate against the fed enemy mid laner.
differential.adaptiveLearningDesc: Our engine learns your playstyle with every match. If you struggle to maintain lane vision early game, the assistant will prioritize ward alerts. If your weakness is wave control in mid game, Rift Sync AI will adjust neural instructions to focus on that.
differential.patternDesc: The AI cross-references your real-time data with billions of data points collected from Challenger-level matches. It identifies winning patterns in map movement and teamfight positioning, informing you which paths to take to maximize your chances of victory.

seoContent.sectionTitle: How to Climb ELO in League of Legends
seoContent.sectionDescription: Practical tips and data-driven methodologies to evolve your gameplay and dominate ranked queues.
seoContent.article1Title: How to climb ELO in LoL consistently?
seoContent.article1P1: Climbing ELO in League of Legends (LoL) requires more than just good mechanics or fast reflexes. The key to consistent rank climbing is data-driven decision making and eliminating recurring mistakes. Focusing on a primary role and reducing your champion pool to a maximum of 3 picks helps build muscle memory and focus on map awareness.
seoContent.article1P2: Furthermore, detailed post-game analysis is essential. Most players make the same mistakes repeatedly without realizing it. Using an AI-powered LoL coaching tool allows you to identify these flaws automatically, such as rotating late to objectives or failing to read enemy jungler positioning.
seoContent.article2Title: What is the best AI for League of Legends coaching?
seoContent.article2P1: With technological evolution, Rift Sync AI has established itself as the leading artificial intelligence tool for League of Legends. Unlike traditional platforms like Blitz.gg, Op.gg or Porofessor that offer raw post-game data, Rift Sync AI acts as a real-time copilot.
seoContent.article2P2: It monitors game telemetry every millisecond and uses neural voice synthesis to deliver strategic macro game instructions directly to the player's headset. The advantages of using Rift Sync AI include:
seoContent.article2Li1: Fast gank alerts based on telemetry and warding.
seoContent.article2Li2: Personalized build and lane rotation suggestions based on the current match.
seoContent.article2Li3: Voice-based tracking and countdown of enemy summoner spells.
seoContent.article2Li4: Zero risk of bans, as it's fully safe and integrated with the official API.
seoContent.article3Title: How to improve macro game and fix mistakes in League of Legends?
seoContent.article3P1: Macro game involves all game strategy that isn't tied to individual combat mechanics. This includes vision control, wave management and neutral objective contestation (Dragon, Baron and Herald).
seoContent.article3P2: To improve your macro game and fix structural errors, follow these best practices:
seoContent.article3Li1Desc: Most gank deaths happen due to visual inattention.
seoContent.article3Li2Desc: Never start a Dragon with enemy minion waves pushing your mid or bot lane towers.
seoContent.article3Li3Desc: Marking the enemy Flash cooldown opens ideal windows for ganks and fights.
seoContent.article3Li4Desc: Walking alone across the map without vision after 25 minutes can cost you the game.
seoContent.article3Note: * Rift Sync AI automates all these reminders by sending contextualized audio suggestions to train your brain at the pace of high elo players.

faq.sectionDescription: Clear your technical and usage questions about Rift Sync AI.
faq.a1: Rift Sync AI is an intelligent voice assistant and real-time overlay for League of Legends. It monitors your match by connecting directly to the game client's secure local API (LCU) and provides contextual tactical tips through neural voice in your ear, helping you make better strategic decisions.
faq.q2: How does the AI analyze my matches?
faq.a2: The AI reads official local logs and telemetry provided by the game natively and in an authorized manner. It processes data such as allied/enemy ward positions, neutral monster timers, enemy CS per minute rates and spent summoner spells, cross-referencing with high-level predictive decision-making algorithms.
faq.q3: Does Rift Sync AI work for any rank?
faq.a3: Yes, Rift Sync AI is adaptable and works from Iron to Challenger. Recommendations adjust to correct the most common weaknesses found at each skill level.
faq.q4: Can I improve my macro game with the app?
faq.a4: Absolutely. The main focus of the AI assistant is to enhance your macro game (global tactical vision, objective control and lane management). It guides you in real time on when to recall, rotate to side lanes (splitpush) or contest neutral objectives.
faq.a5: By eliminating repetitive mistakes and learning to play at the optimal timing suggested by the AI, your decision-making improves consistently, resulting in an increased win rate and rapid rank climbing.
faq.a6: Yes. The entire strategic coaching process is performed in real time automatically during the match. You don't need to stop playing or type commands — the assistant delivers audio alerts in a strategic priority queue.
faq.q7: Does it work with all roles?
faq.a7: Yes, Rift Sync AI has specific modules for Top Lane, Jungle, Mid Lane, Attack Damage Carry (ADC) and Support, adapting tactical tips to each player's role in the composition.

cookie.lgpdDescription: We use cookies to improve your experience, analyze traffic and offer personalized League of Legends feedback. By clicking "Accept All", you agree to the use of cookies. You can also customize your preferences by clicking "Manage".
cookie.essentialDesc: Required for basic site functionality, admin session persistence and security features against CSRF/XSS attacks.
cookie.analyticsDesc: Allow us to monitor site traffic, voice assistant download counts and pages of highest interest for product improvements.
cookie.marketingDesc: Used to integrate social media campaigns and display relevant information about new League of Legends patches.

beta.title: BETA TEST
beta.message1: Rift Sync AI is currently in Beta phase. We are performing daily tests and improvements to the platform.
beta.message2: If you have ideas, suggestions or encounter any bugs, share them with us in our feedback area. I'll be reading them all!
